name: Kimi K3
description: Kimi K3 is Moonshot AI's next-generation multimodal model. Pre-release reporting places it between 2 and 3 trillion total parameters, while Moonshot AI lists a 1,048,576-token context window and official API pricing of $3 per 1M uncached input tokens, $0.30 per 1M cached input tokens, and $15 per 1M output tokens.

details.name: availability_note
details.value: Moonshot AI has published Kimi K3 pricing and a 1,048,576-token context window. Additional coming-soon routes are staged for Akash ML, AtlasCloud, Baseten, Cloudflare, CrofAI, DeepInfra, Fireworks AI, GMI Cloud, Novita AI, SiliconFlow, Together AI, and Venice; those routes remain inactive until each provider publishes its final model ID and pricing.
